name: repost-with-agent
description: Agent-driven, browser-based reposting workflow. The CLI is a thin orchestrator over JSON state; the agent (Claude Code / OpenClaw) drives the user's logged-in browser via its own browser MCP.

scripts.test: npm run build && node tests/dedupe-regression.js && node tests/scheduling-regression.js && node tests/backfill-regression.js && node tests/notify-regression.js && node tests/truncate-regression.js && node tests/overlength-regression.js && node tests/url-expander-regression.js && node tests/agent-task-contract-regression.js
